role: Reasonix-Strategy

source_ref: quant-proj main 921b4e0; A-share 668b735; US 2cbc829; strategy_work official pushed 741a3ab, local ahead 612c432 excluded unless validated
context_delta: R4 asks A-share 203 candidate robustness, conservative momentum 16-candidate deep dive, low-vol reality check, micro portfolio feasibility; US asks 239-symbol research scan, qualitative feedback bootstrap, eligibility_candidate object contract; strategy_work must sync research-only roadmap.
expected_output: concise strategy advisory covering TASK-A-R4-001/002/003/004, TASK-US-R4-001/005/006, TASK-SW-R4-001. Provide keep/drop/rework framework, risk-filter vs generator view, non-actionable research wording, and JSON summary. Do not claim file reads unless you actually read via tools.
boundary: sidecar draft only; no source edits; no recommendation; no buy/sell/hold advice; no target weight; no position sizing; no ticket; no product route; no broker/order/paper/live/auto; no secrets.
human_gate: not required for L0 draft.

</commentary>
